meaning: n.(印度教)宗教虔诚(以对一个神的虔诚信奉求得自身的解脱)
examples: Bhakti Patel is a former chief resident in the University of Chicago's internal-medicine program.
The poets and "saints" of medieval bhakti appeared throughout India.
These yogis, who are still numerous, influenced the teaching of several of the bhakti poets.
"There were no dragon dances or public celebrations, " says Suherman, a caretaker at Jakarta's Vihara Dharma Bhakti temple.
